caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk, speaking into a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features repeating logos that read "UNION HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars, and a sign above him states "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a black container with red and white text including "TALK OUT" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, shifting his facial expressions and slightly adjusting his head position while keeping his hands clasped on the table. He wears a ring on his finger, and a small circular logo is visible on the chest of his hoodie. The overall scene remains static except for the man's subtle movements and speech.
